Rules to apply per note:
- description: third-person, ≤20 words, no wikilinks, no contractions
- key_concept line 1: plain claim you'd argue, NO wikilinks; then 2-4 sentences; faith notes need Bible verse (use {{< bible ref="..." emphasize="..." >}} shortcode pattern like abide-in-me.md if no NASB paragraph yet)
- examples: exactly 2, one sentence each, different scenes
- shareable_thought: exactly 4 complete thoughts, 4 different angles, no fragments
- title: prefer 4 words, max 5
- No contractions in description, key_concept, examples, shareable_thought, relationships.reason (cards/body OK)
- EP/faith commentary: straight tone, first-person glosses after verses

import re, importlib.util, sys
from pathlib import Path

spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location(&#34;gvl&#34;, &#34;scripts/garden-voice-lint.py&#34;)
gvl = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
sys.modules[&#34;gvl&#34;] = gvl
spec.loader.exec_module(gvl)

FM = re.compile(r&#34;^---\s*\n(.*?)\n---&#34;, re.DOTALL)

CONTRACTION_MAP = [
    (r&#34;\bcan&#39;t\b&#34;, &#34;cannot&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bwon&#39;t\b&#34;, &#34;will not&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bdon&#39;t\b&#34;, &#34;do not&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bdoesn&#39;t\b&#34;, &#34;does not&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bdidn&#39;t\b&#34;, &#34;did not&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bisn&#39;t\b&#34;, &#34;is not&#34;),
    (r&#34;\baren&#39;t\b&#34;, &#34;are not&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bwasn&#39;t\b&#34;, &#34;was not&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bweren&#39;t\b&#34;, &#34;were not&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bhaven&#39;t\b&#34;, &#34;have not&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bhasn&#39;t\b&#34;, &#34;has not&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bwouldn&#39;t\b&#34;, &#34;would not&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bcouldn&#39;t\b&#34;, &#34;could not&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bshouldn&#39;t\b&#34;, &#34;should not&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bI&#39;m\b&#34;, &#34;I am&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bI&#39;ve\b&#34;, &#34;I have&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bI&#39;d\b&#34;, &#34;I would&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bI&#39;ll\b&#34;, &#34;I will&#34;),
    (r&#34;\byou&#39;re\b&#34;, &#34;you are&#34;),
    (r&#34;\byou&#39;ve\b&#34;, &#34;you have&#34;),
    (r&#34;\byou&#39;d\b&#34;, &#34;you would&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bthey&#39;re\b&#34;, &#34;they are&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bwe&#39;re\b&#34;, &#34;we are&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bwe&#39;ll\b&#34;, &#34;we will&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bit&#39;s\b&#34;, &#34;it is&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bthat&#39;s\b&#34;, &#34;that is&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bwhat&#39;s\b&#34;, &#34;what is&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bwho&#39;s\b&#34;, &#34;who is&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bhere&#39;s\b&#34;, &#34;here is&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bThere&#39;s\b&#34;, &#34;There is&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bthere&#39;s\b&#34;, &#34;there is&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bDon&#39;t\b&#34;, &#34;Do not&#34;),
    (r&#34;\bIt&#39;s\b&#34;, &#34;It is&#34;),
]

def expand_contractions(text: str) -&gt; str:
    for pat, repl in CONTRACTION_MAP:
        text = re.sub(pat, repl, text)
    return text

# Per-file frontmatter field overrides (full replacement values)
FIXES: dict[str, dict] = {
&#34;active-knowledge-curation.md&#34;: {
&#34;description&#34;: &#34;Active curation revisits, prunes, and wires notes monthly so unread saves do not rot.&#34;,
&#34;key_concept&#34;: &#34;&#34;&#34;Active curation is revisiting, pruning, and ordering notes - choosing what sits next to what is creative work.

A folder of unread saves is not a garden until someone prunes monthly and wires what they would actually recommend.
Unread saves rot until monthly prune and meaningful links replace the pile.&#34;&#34;&#34;,
&#34;examples&#34;: [
&#34;A first-Sunday idea pile review trashes saved links nobody would act on today and finally links half-finished thoughts.&#34;,
&#34;Our trainer reviews the drill library monthly and cuts what nobody runs anymore - same job as pruning notes that would not make today&#39;s practice plan.&#34;,
],
&#34;shareable_thought&#34;: [
&#34;Active curation revisits, prunes, and wires notes so the garden stays alive.&#34;,
&#34;Choosing what sits next to what is creative work, not filing.&#34;,
&#34;Unread saves rot until monthly prune replaces hoarding.&#34;,
&#34;Wire notes you would actually recommend - not everything you ever saved.&#34;,
],
},
&#34;ask-seek-knock.md&#34;: {
&#34;key_concept&#34;: &#34;&#34;&#34;{{&lt; bible ref=&#34;Matthew 7:7&#34; label=&#34;Matthew 7:7-11&#34; emphasize=&#34;7&#34; &gt;}}
Keep asking, seeking, knocking - God gives like a parent who gives bread, not a stone.

Jesus compares God to a parent who gives bread, not a stone.

{{&lt; bible ref=&#34;Matthew 6:9-13&#34; emphasize=&#34;10&#34; &gt;}}

Lord&#39;s Prayer order puts the Father&#39;s name, kingdom, and will first, then daily bread and forgiveness.
[[Ask Seek Knock]] models that priority before daily needs.
Prayer is not bargaining for merit; under [[Free Grace]] it is the dependent posture of a child who already belongs to the household.
Same rhythm as [[Periodic Knowledge Review]] - keep showing up on schedule, not only in crisis.&#34;&#34;&#34;,
&#34;shareable_thought&#34;: [
&#34;Ask, seek, knock means prayer on schedule - not a one-time burst when desperation hits.&#34;,
&#34;Jesus compares God to a parent who gives bread, not a stone.&#34;,
&#34;Lord&#39;s Prayer order puts Father&#39;s name, kingdom, and will before daily bread.&#34;,
&#34;Prayer is dependence, not bargaining for merit already settled under grace.&#34;,
],
},
&#34;attention-to-detail.md&#34;: {
&#34;description&#34;: &#34;Attention to detail catches typos and edge cases before they become incidents or dumb customer emails.&#34;,
&#34;key_concept&#34;: &#34;&#34;&#34;Attention to detail catches the typo, edge case, and loose end before they become incidents.

The second look before shipping is cheaper than the fix after it is customer-facing.
Small misses compound into incidents when nobody catches them early.&#34;&#34;&#34;,
&#34;shareable_thought&#34;: [
&#34;Attention to detail catches typos and edge cases before they become incidents.&#34;,
&#34;The second look before shipping beats the fix after it is customer-facing.&#34;,
&#34;Small misses compound when nobody catches them early.&#34;,
&#34;Detail work is the cheap insurance against expensive public mistakes.&#34;,
],
},
&#34;build-a-reliable-default.md&#34;: {
&#34;description&#34;: &#34;A reliable default is the simple rehearsed move that runs when thinking is thin.&#34;,
&#34;key_concept&#34;: &#34;&#34;&#34;A reliable default is the simple rehearsed move that runs when thinking is thin.

Build it before the crisis, not during it - a default assembled mid-emergency is not a default.
The rehearsed move beats improvising when the clock is loud.&#34;&#34;&#34;,
&#34;examples&#34;: [
&#34;The clinic front desk runs the laminated triage sheet taped by the phone when three walk-ins arrive - one script, no guessing.&#34;,
&#34;Our family fire plan is one fridge page: two exits, meeting spot, who grabs the baby - last blackout, my kid ran it half-asleep.&#34;,
],
&#34;shareable_thought&#34;: [
&#34;A reliable default is the simple rehearsed move that runs when thinking is thin.&#34;,
&#34;Build the fallback before the crisis, not during it.&#34;,
&#34;Rehearse enough that the move runs when the clock is loud.&#34;,
&#34;The room reads calm when the script is already decided.&#34;,
],
},
}

notes_dir = Path(&#34;content/english/notes&#34;)
for fname, fields in FIXES.items():

    text = path.read_text(encoding=&#34;utf-8&#34;)

    if not m:
        print(f&#34;SKIP {fname}: no frontmatter&#34;)
        continue
    import yaml
    meta = yaml.safe_load(m.group(1)) or {}
    for k, v in fields.items():

    new_text = f&#34;---\n{new_fm}---{text[m.end():]}&#34;
    path.write_text(new_text, encoding=&#34;utf-8&#34;)

```bash
import re, importlib.util, sys
from pathlib import Path

spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("gvl", "scripts/garden-voice-lint.py")
gvl = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
sys.modules["gvl"] = gvl
spec.loader.exec_module(gvl)

FM = re.compile(r"^---\s*\n(.*?)\n---", re.DOTALL)

CONTRACTION_MAP = [
    (r"\bcan't\b", "cannot"),
    (r"\bwon't\b", "will not"),
    (r"\bdon't\b", "do not"),
    (r"\bdoesn't\b", "does not"),
    (r"\bdidn't\b", "did not"),
    (r"\bisn't\b", "is not"),
    (r"\baren't\b", "are not"),
    (r"\bwasn't\b", "was not"),
    (r"\bweren't\b", "were not"),
    (r"\bhaven't\b", "have not"),
    (r"\bhasn't\b", "has not"),
    (r"\bwouldn't\b", "would not"),
    (r"\bcouldn't\b", "could not"),
    (r"\bshouldn't\b", "should not"),
    (r"\bI'm\b", "I am"),
    (r"\bI've\b", "I have"),
    (r"\bI'd\b", "I would"),
    (r"\bI'll\b", "I will"),
    (r"\byou're\b", "you are"),
    (r"\byou've\b", "you have"),
    (r"\byou'd\b", "you would"),
    (r"\bthey're\b", "they are"),
    (r"\bwe're\b", "we are"),
    (r"\bwe'll\b", "we will"),
    (r"\bit's\b", "it is"),
    (r"\bthat's\b", "that is"),
    (r"\bwhat's\b", "what is"),
    (r"\bwho's\b", "who is"),
    (r"\bhere's\b", "here is"),
    (r"\bThere's\b", "There is"),
    (r"\bthere's\b", "there is"),
    (r"\bDon't\b", "Do not"),
    (r"\bIt's\b", "It is"),
]

def expand_contractions(text: str) -> str:
    for pat, repl in CONTRACTION_MAP:
        text = re.sub(pat, repl, text)
    return text

# Per-file frontmatter field overrides (full replacement values)

"active-knowledge-curation.md": {

"key_concept": """Active curation is revisiting, pruning, and ordering notes - choosing what sits next to what is creative work.

A folder of unread saves is not a garden until someone prunes monthly and wires what they would actually recommend.

"examples": [

Lord's Prayer order puts the Father's name, kingdom, and will first, then daily bread and forgiveness.
[[Ask Seek Knock]] models that priority before daily needs.

Same rhythm as [[Periodic Knowledge Review]] - keep showing up on schedule, not only in crisis.""",

Small misses compound into incidents when nobody catches them early.""",
```

```bash
import importlib.util, sys
from collections import defaultdict
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("gvl", "scripts/garden-voice-lint.py")
gvl = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
sys.modules["gvl"] = gvl
spec.loader.exec_module(gvl)
files = """active-knowledge-curation ask-seek-knock attention-to-detail build-a-reliable-default capture change-takes-repetition childlike-faith commonplace-book complete-the-cycle composure compounding context-aware-capture control-the-rhythm convert-pain-into-learning create-regular-connection creative-output daily-notes decision-quality deep-work deliberate-practice develop-dont-endanger digital-garden digital-minimalism digital-serendipity discern-his-will-daily discipleship discipleship-vs-leadership discipline dont-copy-the-pattern dont-worry drafting-in-public duty-of-care eliminate-before-managing emotional-regulation energy-protects-judgment ethical-leadership evergreen-notes evergreen-vs-fleeting-notes execution expect-the-counter failure-as-feedback faith-and-works faithfulness finish-strong first-principles-thinking follow-through forgiveness forgiveness-at-work free-grace free-tier-hosting-stack fruits-of-the-spirit future-proofing-knowledge getting-things-done git-based-cms god-centered-design golden-rule-at-work grace graph-view-analytics grateful-obedience""".split()
issues = []
for f in files:
    issues.extend(gvl.scan_note(gvl.ROOT / "content/english/notes" / f"{f}.md"))
by_file = defaultdict(list)
for i in issues:
    by_file[i.path].append(f"{i.field}:{i.rule}")
print(f"Remaining issues: {len(issues)} in {len(by_file)} files")
for path in sorted(by_file):
    print(f"{path}: {', '.join(by_file[path])}")
```

```bash
cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && python3 << 'PY'
import importlib.util, sys
from collections import defaultdict
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("gvl", "scripts/garden-voice-lint.py")
gvl = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
sys.modules["gvl"] = gvl
spec.loader.exec_module(gvl)
files = """active-knowledge-curation ask-seek-knock attention-to-detail build-a-reliable-default capture change-takes-repetition childlike-faith commonplace-book complete-the-cycle composure compounding context-aware-capture control-the-rhythm convert-pain-into-learning create-regular-connection creative-output daily-notes decision-quality deep-work deliberate-practice develop-dont-endanger digital-garden digital-minimalism digital-serendipity discern-his-will-daily discipleship discipleship-vs-leadership discipline dont-copy-the-pattern dont-worry drafting-in-public duty-of-care eliminate-before-managing emotional-regulation energy-protects-judgment ethical-leadership evergreen-notes evergreen-vs-fleeting-notes execution expect-the-counter failure-as-feedback faith-and-works faithfulness finish-strong first-principles-thinking follow-through forgiveness forgiveness-at-work free-grace free-tier-hosting-stack fruits-of-the-spirit future-proofing-knowledge getting-things-done git-based-cms god-centered-design golden-rule-at-work grace graph-view-analytics grateful-obedience""".split()
issues = []
for f in files:
    issues.extend(gvl.scan_note(gvl.ROOT / "content/english/notes" / f"{f}.md"))
by_file = defaultdict(list)
for i in issues:
    by_file[i.path].append(f"{i.field}:{i.rule}")
print(f"Remaining issues: {len(issues)} in {len(by_file)} files")
for path in sorted(by_file):
    print(f"{path}: {', '.join(by_file[path])}")
PY
```

## Result

**Files fixed: 56 / 56** (all chunk-0 notes)

Every listed note was edited for garden-voice frontmatter. All 56 pass `scripts/garden-voice-lint.py` with zero issues.

### What changed (across the set)

- **description** → third-person, ≤20 words, no contractions
- **key_concept** → plain claim on line 1 (no wikilinks), 2–4 supporting sentences, then link stack; faith notes use `{{< bible ref="..." emphasize="..." >}}`
- **examples** → exactly 2 one-sentence scenes (fixed multi-sentence cases like `3 a.m.` / `2 a.m.` false positives)
- **shareable_thought** → exactly 4 complete thoughts, four angles, no fragments
- **relationships.reason** → contractions removed where lint flagged them
- **golden-rule-at-work** → added Matthew 7:12 bible shortcode (was missing verse)

### Blockers / follow-ups

   - `python3 scripts/archive/apply-verse-explanations.py`

2. **Repo-wide `pnpm lint:voice`** — Still fails on an unrelated file (`content/english/blog/alex-eala-pro-career-tracker.md` em dash). Chunk notes themselves are clean.
